title: Overview
seoDescription: An introduction to the Centre for Plant Medicine Research — our role, reach, and how to explore our history and governance.
lede: How the Centre serves Ghana as a national institution for plant-based medicine research.
bodyParagraphs: The Centre for Plant Medicine Research (CPMR) advances scientific understanding of medicinal plants through rigorous research, quality assurance, and responsible translation of traditional knowledge.
Our work spans laboratory science, clinical services, regulatory support for herbal products, and public education — always with attention to safety, evidence, and national health priorities.

Explore the sections in this area to learn about our history, mandate, leadership, and partnerships. Content is maintained as verified institutional material for government, research, and public audiences.
